title: helianthemum alpestre
intro: Helianthemum alpestre, also known as alpine rockrose or alpine sunrose, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content, which exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Helianthemum alpestre include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin care. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to treat various ailments, and its extracts have also been used in cosmetic products for their antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
